{% extends "base.html" %} {% block content %}
About

Built for electrical teams that need fast, visible compliance.

VoltSafe brings daily worker checks, hazard evidence, QR verification, reports, and analytics into a clean operational dashboard.

{% for icon, title, text in [ ('bi-qr-code-scan','QR Verification','Generate and scan worker QR links for quick site access.'), ('bi-clipboard2-check','Daily Checklists','Capture PPE, lockout, tool, and panel safety status.'), ('bi-camera','Hazard Evidence','Upload images and classify hazards by severity and zone.'), ('bi-file-earmark-pdf','PDF Reporting','Download a clean compliance summary for supervisors.') ] %}
{{ title }}

{{ text }}

{% endfor %}
{% endblock %}
